recurring_without_skill_failures: uses_mysql_directly: without-skill tries direct mysql connections on 2/3 evals — explicit guardrail violation
no_project_config_check: without-skill never checks migrate-instructions.prompt.md — misses project-specific overrides
no_standard_output: without-skill produces freeform responses; downstream skills get no structured db_key/drush_option/connection_status
wrong_drush_command: uses sql-connect or sqlq rather than sql:query
no_stop_on_failure: without-skill provides a troubleshooting list instead of stopping as required
skill_gaps_found: MISSING: ## Prerequisites section — all other skills in suite have one
MISSING: ## Input section — most other skills have one
HARDCODED: container name 'drupal-tools' and shell 'ash' not documented as configurable from project config
WEAK STOP: 'ask user' for multiple keys can be reasoned around when PHP comments are present — needs stronger wording
DESCRIPTION: undersells the skill's role as the foundational prerequisite for 8/13 migration skills
